title: SHAPE datasets from manuscript: Modulation of pre-mRNA structure by hnRNP proteins regulates alternative splicing of MALT1
author: Jones, Alisha
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Normalized SHAPE reactivity for the MALT1 M1 minigene RNA constructs (wildtype, variant 1, and variant 2) reported in the manuscript titled 'Modulation of pre-mRNA structure by hnRNP proteins regulates alternative splicing of  MALT1'  .
